column1: Table ES-5:  U.S. Greenhouse Gas Emissions Allocated to Economic Sectors (MMT CO2 Eq.)
a The LULUCF sector net total is the net sum of all LULUCF CH4 and N2O emissions to the atmosphere plus LULUCF net carbon stock changes.

Notes: Total (gross) emissions are presented without LULUCF. Total net emissions are presented with LULUCF. Totals may not sum due to independent rounding. Parentheses indicate negative values or sequestration.
